name: Stripe Subscriptions
description: Stripe subscription management with webhook handling, checkout sessions, and subscription gating
author: SonicJS Team

stripePriceId.label: Default Price ID
stripePriceId.description: Default Stripe Price ID for checkout sessions (price_...)

successUrl.label: Checkout Success URL
successUrl.description: URL to redirect to after successful checkout

cancelUrl.label: Checkout Cancel URL
cancelUrl.description: URL to redirect to if checkout is cancelled

permissions.stripe:manage: Manage Stripe settings and view all subscriptions

hooks.stripe:subscription.created: Fired when a new subscription is created
hooks.stripe:subscription.updated: Fired when a subscription is updated
hooks.stripe:subscription.deleted: Fired when a subscription is cancelled/deleted
